title: Get Colonized
body:
## Get colonized! Colonizing... Imagine such a British past time being your day to day? Imagine no longer friend! Get Colonized is a Minecolonies centered modpack for your hunger for new lands to conquer. Build an inspiring colony with suspicious means of gaining wealth and crush your political enemies without mercy! They did steal your fish after all... Available for 1.20.1, the modpack is designed primarily for the Get Colonized Minecraft server featured in the pack, but also completely functional standalone. Whether you play solo or with us and the many other colonizing gamers, we can assure you'll have a colony in no time! May you flipper to success! 🐧 Any questions about this modpack can be directed to my discord and even more information is provided on my website.
Feedback
